meaning: adj.田园短诗的,牧歌的,生动逼真的
examples: It appears to be an idyllic domestic setup.
Rosie's idyllic world came to an abrupt end when her parents' marriage broke up.
The island boasts two exceptional beaches: Tung Wan, a popular bathing area with idyllic beach houses and Kwan-yin Wan, known as a windsurfing haven.
Le Mas Perreal is an idyllic place for lovers of solitude, lovely hilltop villages and fine dining.
On Lantau Island, west of Hong Kong Island, are two other idyllic seaside camping spots.
